rationale: The Executor is blocked on a missing credential (STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET) that does not exist in the codebase or the team's password manager. This is an external fact/credential provisioning issue that exceeds arbitration authority — the operator must obtain the test-mode webhook secret from Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks and add it to .env.test (or 1Password 'shared-eng'). Unit tests with mocked signatures pass; only end-to-end integration testing is blocked. No plan amendment or retry directive can produce the secret.

errors: Claude Code returned an error result: Reached maximum budget ($0.4)
